'''Yrada Soludisan''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Along with two other Knights, Soludisan was killed aboard the ''[[Monitor III]]'' during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
When the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] broke out between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Soludisan was called before the High Council to accept a mission. The Council informed Soludisan that the Confederacy had been in contact with the [[Iridium Pirates/Legends|Pirates of Iridium]] in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] and were planning to steal shipments of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] from a host of Republic convoys. Under the leadership of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] and [[Belsed-Qan Idan]], Soludisan and several other Jedi accompanied a task force of [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] [[Judicial/Legends|agents]] aboard the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|Republic cruiser]] ''[[Monitor III]]''. Protected by a number of [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi-piloted starfighters]], the Jedi were ambushed immediately after coming out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="HNN" />

Surprised by the pirates' powerful weaponry, augmented by their unique [[Power gem|gem technology]], the ''Monitor III'' sustained heavy damage, killing many Judiciaries and three Jedi Knights. Among the dead were Jedi [[Aruden Kej]], [[Dovish Hokken]], and Soludisan. The ''Monitor III'' survived the skirmish and was able to return to Coruscant without any further causalities, though the mission was deemed a failure.<ref name="HNN" />
